content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 2.1 — Claims "fully offline" and "export as PDF" are backed by LocalStore.swift (no networking, local JSON persistence, App/LocalStore.swift:1-19) and PDFExporter.swift's UIGraphicsPDFRenderer implementation (App/PDFExporter.swift:1-16); no AI/ML/sync/ad-block claims are present to reconcile.
